tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search companies by ticker or name across US/JP/KR/HK/CN/UK.

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Get company facts (name, exchange, industry, regulator id, filings url).

tools.name: get_financials
tools.description: Get all three financial statements (IS + BS + CF) for a ticker.

tools.name: get_income_statement
tools.description: Get income statement (revenue, costs, margins, EPS).

tools.name: get_cash_flow
tools.description: Get cash flow statement (OCF, ICF, FCF, capex, dividends).

tools.name: get_prices
tools.description: Get daily price history for a ticker.

tools.name: get_segments
tools.description: Get reported business / geographic / product segments.

tools.name: get_segments_trend
tools.description: Get time-series of segment values across periods for trend analysis.

tools.name: get_director_holdings
tools.description: Get director / officer shareholdings (insider equity stakes).

tools.name: get_insider_trades
tools.description: Get insider trading activity (US Form 4 filings).

tools.name: get_metrics
tools.description: Get latest valuation + financial metrics snapshot (PE, PB, ROE etc.).

tools.name: screen_companies
tools.description: Screen stocks across US/JP/KR/HK/CN by valuation + quality metrics (PE, PB, ROE, margins, market cap, dividend yield).

tools.name: get_metrics_history
tools.description: Get historical derived metrics (TTM aggregates + margins per period).

tools.name: compare_metrics
tools.description: Compare valuation metrics across multiple tickers.
